description: The file '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicSurvival.csv' is already open in Jamovi. Analyze whether children had a better survival rate than adults by creating a transformed variable named 'AgeGroup' from the 'age' variable, where values less than 18 are labeled 'Child' and others are 'Adult'. Perform a contingency table analysis with 'AgeGroup' as rows and 'survived' as columns, including Chi-square and Odds ratio measures. Save the Jamovi project to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Titanic_Age_Analysis.omv' and record the numeric Odds Ratio value (showing how many times more likely a Child was to survive compared to an Adult) in '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/survival_odds.txt'.
